about.title: About
about.subtitle: Learn more about MyGarage
about.tagline: Self-hosted vehicle maintenance tracker for the homelab community
about.whatIsDescription1: MyGarage is a self-hosted vehicle maintenance tracker that keeps every detail of your fleet — fuel-ups, service visits, fluids, registrations, warranties, recalls, and notes — in one place under your control.
about.whatIsDescription2: Designed for the homelab community, MyGarage runs on your own infrastructure with no third-party data sharing or telemetry. Your vehicle data stays yours.
about.privacyFirstDesc: Your data lives on your hardware. No external servers, no analytics, no surprise integrations.
about.databaseSettingsDesc: Choose SQLite (default) for simple homelab use or PostgreSQL for multi-user deployments. Migrations apply automatically on startup.
about.multiNotificationsDesc: Get reminded about maintenance via Ntfy, Apprise, email, or webhook — wherever fits your homelab.
about.comprehensiveTrackingDesc: Fuel economy, DEF usage, tire pressure history, scheduled maintenance, photos, documents, and live OBD-II telemetry — covered.
about.builtWithAIDesc: MyGarage is the result of a human-in-the-loop collaboration between Jamey and a team of AI assistants. Each agent specialises in a different part of the workflow.
about.claudeRole: design, planning, code review, and implementation
about.nhtsaDesc1: VIN decoding, recall lookups, and safety data are all sourced from the U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration's public APIs — free, official, and authoritative.
about.nhtsaDesc2: Note: NHTSA data is most complete for vehicles sold in the United States.
